title: SWE-PRBench: Benchmarking AI Code Review Quality Against Pull Request Feedback
summary: arXiv:2603.26130v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We introduce SWE-PRBench, a benchmark of 350 pull requests with human-annotated ground truth for evaluating AI code review quality. summary: arXiv:2603.26244v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Domain-driven design (DDD) is a powerful design technique for architecting complex software systems.
